message:
fix(export): handle empty stdin pipe in wizard to prevent infinite hang

The wizard would block forever when stdin was an empty pipe (e.g.,
from strings.NewReader("") in tests). This fix adds pipe detection
with a 100ms timeout to detect immediate EOF and return an error
instead of hanging indefinitely.

- Add helper function to wrap io.Reader as os.File via os.Pipe()
- Detect pipes vs regular files using os.ModeCharDevice
- Use goroutine with timeout to check for immediate EOF
- Replace stdin with buffered pipe if data is available

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
